items.summary: arXiv:2604.15421v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Secondary eclipse observations are a powerful way to investigate whether or not a rocky exoplanet hosts an atmosphere, as an atmospheric presence would transport heat to the nightside and render the dayside colder than anticipated.…
